element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Movement fundamentals established before combat introduction
Shooting enemies as primary offensive tool

element_introduction_order.element: Worm whip mechanics (whipping enemies and swinging from hooks)

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Pattern recognition and enemy-specific tactics required
Third-person perspective shift, collection and obstacle avoidance
Conditional success: must protect NPC while navigating hazards
Novel hybrid mechanic requiring timing and combat

typical_tension_triggers: Racing sequences with catch-up pressure from Psy-Crow
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating tension cycles: standard platforming combat sections punctuated by mechanical variation (racing, escort, combat variants) and boss climaxes at level ends; rhythm breaks with Andy Asteroids interludes between levels

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core mechanics (jumping, shooting, whipping) in manageable platforming contexts; enemy density increases gradually
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Integration of specialized mechanics (escort protection, multi-phase bosses, racing pressure); established enemies recur in varied contexts
difficulty_curve.late_game: Combination of mechanics under pressure; complex boss patterns; racing sequences become more competitive
notable_spikes: For Pete's Sake level: first major spike due to escort mechanic and conditional failure state
Boss battles with pattern variation (Psy-Crow race-to-boss hybrid, Queen Slug-for-a-Butt, others)
Underwater maze: time pressure and crash penalties

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal side-scrolling platforming with mixed enemy encounters, obstacle avoidance, and culminating boss battle
Third-person perspective shift to behind-the-character racing through tube structure; collection-based scoring against Psy-Crow; win = instant progression, loss = mandatory boss fight
Standard platforming with NPC protection objective; whip-mechanics used to manipulate ally behavior; enemy defeat required before NPC contact; failure depletes health via ally retaliation
Levels introducing isolated gameplay systems (bungee-fighting hybrid, underwater maze with time limit and collision damage)
